name: Cherry-Raisin Pork Cubes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds boneless pork loin roast (rib end)
2 cups green bell pepper, cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the pork using your favorite method.
2. When cool, cut the meat into 1-inch cubes.
3. To prepare the sauce, combine pie filling, vinegar, raisins, onion, cloves, garlic powder, and pepper in a pan.
4. Heat the sauce to a gentle boil over medium heat, then reduce to a simmer.
5. Add the green bell pepper and pork cubes to the sauce.
6. Simmer gently for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Transfer the mixture to a chafing dish, sprinkle with sesame seeds, and serve hot.
Special Hints:
- Skewer the pork cubes and green pepper chunks with toothpicks for convenient self-service.
- Keep covered and serve hot.
